actionSummaries.fold: Surrender hand and forfeit current bets
actionSummaries.check: Pass without adding chips to the pot
actionSummaries.call: Match the current bet to stay in the hand

reset-reopen-state-for-live-seats.summary: Reset action flags for live players

reset-reopen-state-for-eligible-actors.summary: Reopen action for eligible players after raise

betting-round-completion.summary: Check if betting round is complete

advance-after-betting.summary: Advance to next phase after betting

mark-preflop-big-blind-acted.summary: Mark big blind option as exercised

award-uncontested-pot.summary: Award pot to last remaining player

dealHoleCards.summary: Deal two hole cards to each player
